description: A photograph of a man outdoors in a forest or plantation setting, wearing a cap and dark polo shirt with yellow trim, measuring the circumference or diameter of a tree trunk with a tape measure. He is leaning in toward the tree and looking intently at the measurement. The background shows many tall trees and green ground cover, suggesting a wooded or agricultural environment. Lighting appears natural daylight. The image is cropped tightly around the man and tree, with no visible text overlays. The photo likely illustrates forestry, sourcing, or environmental assessment context.
